            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_technology = hardware_V
        }
        set_technology = { high_mach_jet_interceptor4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

# ── AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (5 techs) ──

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    # iw_medium_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_airframe — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1926 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { iw_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe — 1936

    # reinforced_wings_mothership — 1942

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_large_airframe }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = miniature_fighters }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { miniature_fighters = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aerial_hangars — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = aerial_hangars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { aerial_hangars = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (37 techs) ──

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines, hardware_XIII]

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    # early_bomber — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = stealth_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
        }
        set_technology = { stealth_tactical_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # stealth_strategic_bomber1 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = stealth_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { stealth_strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mach2stratbomber3 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mach2stratbomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { mach2stratbomber3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber8 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { naval_bomber8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber8 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # stealth_strategic_bomber2 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = stealth_strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
        }
        set_technology = { stealth_strategic_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mach6stratbomber — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mach6stratbomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
        }
        set_technology = { mach6stratbomber = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { improved_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_improved_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# consumer_electronics_VIII
#   year=2020 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_XIV, software_XIV, transistor_XIV, interwebs_IX]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwebs_VIII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { interwebs_VIII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transistor_XIII — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transistor_XIII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { transistor_XIII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # supercomputer_VI — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = supercomputer_VI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
            has_technology = transistor_XIII
            has_technology = supercomputer_V
        }
        set_technology = { supercomputer_VI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # hardware_XIV — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = hardware_XIV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { hardware_XIV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # software_XIV — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = software_XIV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { software_XIV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coms_VII — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coms_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            NOT = { has_technology = interwebs_IX }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            NOT = { has_technology = transistor_XIV }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { transistor_XIV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # consumer_electronics_VII — 2010

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = consumer_electronics_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
            has_technology = software_XIII
            has_technology = transistor_XIII
            has_technology = interwebs_VII
        }
        set_technology = { consumer_electronics_VII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # hardware_XV — 2015

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = hardware_XV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { hardware_XV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # software_XV — 2015

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = software_XV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwebs_X — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwebs_X }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }

            NOT = { has_technology = supercomputer_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            NOT = { has_technology = hardware_XVI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }

            has_technology = interwebs_IX

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    # basic_fortification_tech — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_fort_tech_1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = interwebs_VII
        }
        set_technology = { logistics_XI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # civil_engineering_XI — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = civil_engineering_XI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = interwebs_VII
        }
        set_technology = { civil_engineering_XI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # factory_automation_I — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = factory_automation_I }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = industrial_robots_V
            has_technology = production_efficiency_X
            has_technology = software_X
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { factory_automation_I = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # management_X — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = management_X }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { management_X = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # civil_engineering_XII — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = civil_engineering_XII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { civil_engineering_XII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # excavation_VI — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = excavation_VI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { excavation_VI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # chemistry_VI — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = chemistry_VI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { chemistry_VI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # logistics_XII — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = logistics_XII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = interwebs_VIII
        }
        set_technology = { logistics_XII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # factory_automation_II — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = factory_automation_II }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = software_XI
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { factory_automation_II = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # civil_engineering_XIII — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = civil_engineering_XIII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { civil_engineering_XIII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # materials_VII — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = materials_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { materials_VII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # plastics_VI — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = plastics_VI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { plastics_VI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # logistics_XIII — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = logistics_XIII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = interwebs_IX
        }
        set_technology = { logistics_XIII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # management_XI_A — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = management_XI_A }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { management_XI_A = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # management_XI_B — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = management_XI_B }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { management_XI_B = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # civil_engineering_XIV — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = civil_engineering_XIV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { civil_engineering_XIV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # excavation_VII — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = excavation_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { excavation_VII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # chemistry_VII — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = chemistry_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { chemistry_VII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # factory_automation_III — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = factory_automation_III }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = software_XIII
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
        }
        set_technology = { factory_automation_III = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # civil_engineering_XV — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = civil_engineering_XV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { civil_engineering_XV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # materials_VIII — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = materials_VIII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { materials_VIII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # plastics_VII — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = plastics_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { plastics_VII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # logistics_XIV — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = logistics_XIV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = interwebs_XI
        }
        set_technology = { logistics_XIV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # factory_automation_IV — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = factory_automation_IV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            has_technology = software_XIV
            has_technology = hardware_XIV
        }
        set_technology = { factory_automation_IV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[ww_pc]

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XI, supercomputer_V]

#   year=2000 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XII]

#   year=2000 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XI]

#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XIII]

# irbm8
#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XIII]

# atomic_weapons_delivery_V
#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XIII]

# nuclearstratbomber2
#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[jet_engines, atomic_reactor_naval_II, hardware_XIII]

# atomic_reactor_fusion_III
#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XIII, supercomputer_VI]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    # atomic_research — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = ww_pc
        }
        set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { isotope_separation_centrifugal = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # atomic_weapons — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { atomic_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # atomic_reactor_0 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_reactor_0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { slbm6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # icbm4 — 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = icbm4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { icbm4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # atomic_weapons_delivery_IV — 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_weapons_delivery_IV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { atomic_weapons_delivery_IV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # srbm8 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = srbm8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { srbm8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # irbm7 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = irbm7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { irbm7 = 1 popup = no }

            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_reactor_naval_II }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_VIII
        }
        set_technology = { atomic_reactor_naval_II = 1 popup = no }

            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_reactor_fission_II }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            has_technology = supercomputer_V

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_XII

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (13 techs) ──

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_0
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_I
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_II
#   year=1970 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_III
#   year=1980 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_IV
#   year=1990 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_V
#   year=2000 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_VI
#   year=2010 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_VII
#   year=2020 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    # radio_detection — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { cavity_magnatron = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { centimetric_radar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { phased_array = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { monopulse_radar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_0 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_0 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_I — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_I }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_I = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_II — 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_II }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_II = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_III — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_III }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_III = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_IV — 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_IV }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_IV = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_V — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_V }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_V = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_VI — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_VI }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_VI = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_VII — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_VII }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radar_VII = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_X]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = rocket_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rocket1 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rocket1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }

            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

        }
        set_technology = { atgm_carrier_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rocket3 — 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rocket3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1975 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { sp_rocket3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sam_short_range_2 — 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sam_short_range_2 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1975 }

# ── LAND / ANTI_AIR (6 techs) ──

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    # interwar_antiair — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_antiair = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_TANK (8 techs) ──

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { mountain_tanks = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_antitank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { SWE_bofors_antitank_gun = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# heavy_sp_artillery_5
#   year=2005 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[hardware_XII]

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    # basic_battery — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # autocannon_1 — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = autocannon_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { autocannon_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery_1 — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { artillery_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # direct_fire_gun_1 — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = direct_fire_gun_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { direct_fire_gun_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { gw_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_battery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_shell — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_shell = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_battery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_shell — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_shell = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { railway_gun = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { artillery1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { sp_artillery_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_sp_artillery_5 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_sp_artillery_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { light_sp_artillery_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_sp_artillery_5 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_sp_artillery_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_technology = hardware_XII
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_sp_artillery_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (20 techs) ──

#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70
