#   year=1950 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[hardware_I]

# heavy_tanks_5
#   year=1960 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[hardware_III]

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # heavy_tanks_1 — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_tanks_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_tanks_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    # infantry_weapons — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_equip_1 — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_equip_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1935 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = manpats_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_technology = hardware_IX
            has_technology = manpats_4
        }
        set_technology = { manpats_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # manpads_4 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = manpads_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_technology = hardware_IX
            has_technology = manpads_3
        }
        set_technology = { manpads_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # protection_equip_5 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = protection_equip_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_technology = protection_equip_4
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { protection_equip_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (14 techs) ──

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_1
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_3
#   year=1947 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_4
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_I]

# light_tanks_5
#   year=1975 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_IV]

# light_tanks_6
#   year=1995 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_VII]

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    # gwtank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_1 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tanks_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { light_tanks_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_2 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tanks_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { light_tanks_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_3 — 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tanks_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { light_tanks_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_4 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tanks_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_I
        }
        set_technology = { light_tanks_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_5 — 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tanks_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1975 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_IV
        }
        set_technology = { light_tanks_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_6 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tanks_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_VII
        }
        set_technology = { light_tanks_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) ──

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    # mechanised_infantry — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1944 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks_2
#   year=1947 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1950 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_I]

#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_III]

#   year=1965 branch=land category=medium_tanks

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_VI]

#   year=1985 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_VII]

# main_battle_tanks_8
#   year=1995 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_IX]

# main_battle_tanks_9
#   year=2005 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_X]

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank — 1939

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        set_technology = { improved_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_2 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_I
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_4 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_III
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_5 — 1965
    if = {

            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1965 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_IV
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_6 — 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1975 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_VI
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_7 — 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_VII
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_8 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_9 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tanks_9 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tanks_9 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) ──

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    # main_battle_tank — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MOTORISED (1 techs) ──

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    # tech_trucks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        set_technology = { tech_trucks = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=15 deps=[tech_mech_recon6, tech_recon7, mechanized_infantry7]

# tech_logistics_company_helicopter7
#   year=2000 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=15 deps=[tech_logistics_company_helicopter6, tech_logistics_company7, cargo_helicopter_5]

arm_grant_land_support = {
    # basic_train — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { basic_train = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon_focus_bonus — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_recon_focus_bonus = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_engineer_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_engineer_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_engineer_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_maintenance_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_maintenance_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_maintenance_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_signal_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_signal_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_signal_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_helicopter_med_evac_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_helicopter_med_evac_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_helicopter_med_evac_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_motorized_military_police_tech — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_motorized_military_police_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_motorized_military_police_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # combat_support — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = combat_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { combat_support = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # combat_service_support — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = combat_service_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { combat_service_support = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # night_vision — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = night_vision }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { night_vision = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_engineers = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # armored_car1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_td — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_art — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_art = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_spaa — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_4 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { armor_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_4 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { engine_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_td — 1945

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

        set_technology = { modern_td = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_art — 1945

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_technology = motorised_infantry_2
        }
        set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company2 = 1 popup = no }

# ── NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (15 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    # early_ship_hull_heavy — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battlecruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battlecruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { improved_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# carrier_hull_super_4
#   year=2005 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    # early_ship_hull_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

        set_technology = { early_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── NAVAL / DESTROYERS (17 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sonar
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_destroyer
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_sonar
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_destroyer
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_sonar
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    # early_ship_hull_light — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # sonar — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_destroyer — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # improved_sonar — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # advanced_sonar — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_destroyer — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # modern_sonar — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_destroyer — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (5 techs) ──

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_heavy_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { early_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (8 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_light_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { early_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    # basic_torpedo — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_torpedo = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_naval_mines }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { countermeasures_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # conventional_sub_engines_4 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = conventional_sub_engines_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { conventional_sub_engines_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sub_batteries_2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sub_batteries_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sub_batteries_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_uav_2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_uav_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_XII
        }
        set_technology = { naval_uav_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_armament_aa_4 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_armament_aa_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_XII
        }
        set_technology = { ship_armament_aa_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_armament_light_4 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_armament_light_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_VI
        }
        set_technology = { ship_armament_light_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_armament_medium_4 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_armament_medium_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_VI
        }
        set_technology = { ship_armament_medium_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radar_aa_4 — 2000

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radar_aa_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_VII
        }
        set_technology = { radar_aa_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # maritime_sonar_4 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = maritime_sonar_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_XII
        }
        set_technology = { maritime_sonar_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # subkiller_6 — 2000

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = subkiller_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { subkiller_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_helicopter_7 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_helicopter_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { naval_helicopter_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_uav_3 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_uav_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_XIII
