        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # countermeasures_6 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = countermeasures_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { countermeasures_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    # early_ship_hull_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww_submarines — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww_submarines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ww_submarines = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # torpedo_ww — 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = torpedo_ww }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        set_technology = { torpedo_ww = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_submarine — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            NOT = { has_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech — 1939

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
    # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_submarine — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_sam_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        set_technology = { light_sam_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # vls_1 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = vls_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        set_technology = { vls_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # attack_submarine_5 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = attack_submarine_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_technology = hardware_IX
        }
        set_technology = { attack_submarine_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ballistic_submarine_5 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ballistic_submarine_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_technology = hardware_XI
        }
        set_technology = { ballistic_submarine_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sub_hull_small_single_4 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sub_hull_small_single_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sub_hull_small_single_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sub_hull_large_double_3 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sub_hull_large_double_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sub_hull_large_double_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # torpedo_small_4 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = torpedo_small_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_technology = hardware_X
        }
        set_technology = { torpedo_small_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
